meaning: n.花,开花的植物,花卉,精华,盛时vi.开花,旺盛,成熟vt.用花装饰,使开花
examples: The flower opens to reveal a bee.
I've been weeding the flower beds.
Cut the flower stems on the slant.
Each year, the perfume maker celebrates a different flower and 2011 honours the orange blossom.
The company maintains protected wetlands (with snapping turtles), Monarch butterfly habitat and flower meadows.
